descriptionShort: 1990 AHL game clip: Maine Mariners vs Moncton Hawks featuring Rick Boyd and Bryan Marchment.
descriptionLong: This archival footage captures a professional hockey matchup from February 17, 1990, between the Maine Mariners and Moncton Hawks in the American Hockey League (AHL). The clip highlights Richmond Sockeyes alumni Rick Boyd and Bryan Marchment during their pro careers, showcasing their performance at the developmental league level.
